title: Das Geheimnis um Johann Orth
writer: Georg C. Klaren, Paul Merzbach, Willi Wolff
actors: Karl Ludwig Diehl, Ellen Richter, Paul Wegener
plot: A Hapsburg archduke in the 1880s gives up his title, changes his name, marries a Viennese actress, and then disappears with her on a South American ocean voyage.
